reason: Keep new storage/retrieval code in existing backend ownership boundaries.
Deep Research branch runtime and tool contract changes must stay compatible.
Use runtime-managed additive persistence patterns for new metadata storage.
Keep ingestion and retrieval failures degradable and API-safe.
Log MinIO/Milvus/embedding failures with stable subsystem prefixes and no secrets.
Reuse existing fetching/parsing helpers and avoid duplicated chunk/source shaping logic.
